flags.description: Master toggle for check-in POSTs. Off = POST /attendance/check-in returns 503. Emergency-only.
Off = every state transition endpoint returns 503. Kiosks stop mutating attendance state. Emergency-only.
Off = ReconcileAttendanceJob no-ops. Absences accumulate untriaged.
Off = ChargeNoShowFeeJob no-ops. Emergency-only for tenant-specific dispute resolution.
Off = FreezeMembershipOnThresholdReached hook no-ops. AbsenceFreezeThresholdReached still fires (audit trail); membership stays active.
Off = CleanupOrphanCheckinsJob no-ops. Atomicity drift accumulates until re-enabled — dangerous.
Off = PurgeCompletedAttendanceJob no-ops. Records past retention accumulate.
Off = GenerateAttendanceReportJob no-ops. Weekly digest emails suspended.
When ON, geofence-verified check-ins refuse when GPS outside radius. When OFF (test / staging), warns but allows.
